svg.title: Microstructure master plate: absorption as effort without result
svg.desc: Candidate class master plate. Four body panels (price path, footprint, DOM ladder, cumulative delta) carry the absorption read: aggressive volume and positive delta press into a defended level, the passive offer reloads, price fails to print through, and price resolves down against the buyers. An evidence rail and a forbidden-misread rail verify the body. Status: candidate, pending human Visual Art Director approval, not approved production.
svg.text: Microstructure: Absorption as Effort Without Result
Class master plate calibrated on footprint, DOM, and delta. The body carries the read; the rails verify.
CANDIDATE MASTER PLATE, PENDING HUMAN VISUAL ART DIRECTOR APPROVAL.
Not approved production. No approval record.
positive above the 0 line (sign by baseline position)
Each box must be ticked against
the BODY, not the rail. The rail
Aggressors spend heavy volume and positive delta into the level; the passive offer reloads; price fails to print through and resolves against the buyers.
Read: a responsive trade against the absorbed aggressors once price fails and rolls, in context. Absorption is preparation evidence, not permission to chase the flow.
Class: Microstructure | Figure type: footprint_dom_delta_sequence | Calibration: CH04 absorption | Canvas 1280 × 720 | 8 px grid
STATUS: CANDIDATE | not human-approved | no sign-off recorded
